title: jurinea multicaulis
intro: Jurinea multicaulis, also known as the Mongolian fleabane, is a perennial plant species in the family Asteraceae. It has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral effects. The plant's roots, leaves, and flowers are believed to provide various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting immune function. Jurinea multicaulis is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or dried extracts for medicinal use.
